channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats tread cautiously around another Trump impeachment after 'illegal' Iran strikes
U.S. private-sector hiring picked up in February, ADP data show
'No to war’: Spain PM hits back at Trump threat to cut trade over air base dispute
item.description: His comments come after the U.S. president pledged to cut off all trade with Madrid over its position on the Iran conflict.

item.title: Iran war live updates: Hegseth says 'more forces are arriving;' Bessent says oil trade in the Gulf will get U.S. support
item.description: Follow the latest news after the U.S. and Israel launched a massive attack on Iran that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: The key comment a Blackstone exec made on the state of private credit
Violent stock-market swings are sending a message about the Iran conflict
Bessent says global 15% tariff starts this week, predicts Trump duties will return to old levels later this year
item.description: The Supreme Court last month ruled that President Donald Trump's sweeping global tariffs are not authorized under the law known as IEEPA.

item.title: Talarico wins Texas Senate Democratic nomination while Cornyn and Paxton head to Republican runoff
item.description: State Rep. James Talarico topped Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett in an expensive and fiercely contested Texas Senate Democratic primary.

item.title: Economic calendar: Watch for ADP employment data and ISM service-sector update
Selloff descends into a rout in South Korean stocks
